Name: insert_notes
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::uuid AS "author_id", $3::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $4::uuid), mutation_result_0_check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result_0) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."id", check_mutation_result_0."author_id", check_mutation_result_0."title" FROM check_mutation_result_0 WHERE (SELECT status FROM mutation_result_0_check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "id", $6::uuid AS "author_id", $7::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $8::uuid), mutation_result_1_check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result_1) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."id", check_mutation_result_1."author_id", check_mutation_result_1."title" FROM check_mutation_result_1 WHERE (SELECT status FROM mutation_result_1_check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."id", mutation_result_0."author_id", mutation_result_0."title" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."id", mutation_result_1."author_id", mutation_result_1."title" FROM mutation_result_1), check_nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $9::text AS "body", $10::text AS "visibility", mutation_result_0."id" AS "note_id" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT $11::text AS "body", $12::text AS "visibility", mutation_result_1."id" AS "note_id" FROM mutation_result_1) AS data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mutation_result g WHERE data."note_id" = g."id" AND g."author_id" = $13::uuid) AND data."visibility" = $14::text), nested_replies_check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_nested_replies) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_replies AS (INSERT INTO "public"."note_replies" ("body", "visibility", "note_id") SELECT check_nested_replies."body", check_nested_replies."visibility", check_nested_replies."note_id" FROM check_nested_replies WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_replies_check_count) = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."title" AS "title" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
